subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Aqdas (Tablet to the Christians)
subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from Our presence unto him whom the veils of names have failed to keep back from God
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی مامنعته سبحات الاسماء عن الله فاطر الارض و السما
subcodes.subjects: @monasticism; asceticism, @proclamation to Christians, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Mosaic imagery, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
